channel.title: Face-Detection on Make Things Happen
channel.description: Recent content in Face-Detection on Make Things Happen

item.title: Implementing Face Detection in Android
item.description: Recently, I got a task to implement face detection for a camera preview we have within our mobile app. So if the app detects a face, a button should be displayed, otherwise – the button should remain hidden. There are several ways to implement face detection in Android
